actions.name: Fearmonger

cost.trigger: A creature hits the user with a [Contact] attack.

actions.description: Effect: The user’s Attacks have a 20% chance to inflict Affliction[paralysis 5] on targets that have @Affliction[fear]. NEEDS AUTOMATION

actions.name: Fearmonger
actions.description: Effect: Valid targets in range are @Affliction[fear] and @Affliction[suppressed]. NEEDS AUTOMATION

system.description: Effect: The user’s Attacks have a 20% chance to inflict Affliction[paralysis 5] on targets that have @Affliction[fear]. Enemy creatures within 8m have @Affliction[fear] and @Affliction[suppressed]. NEEDS AUTOMATION.
